notes: 2026-06-11 GPU1 h96-focused compressed curriculum probe: same clean FutureSeed+loop D256/L12/loop5, but 2400 total steps and compressed early stages 16-36:100,36-60:150,60-72:250,72-84:500,84-96:1400 due remaining lease. Purpose: test whether h96 opens by spending proportionally more time in 84-96, or whether full middle-stage foundation is required. Result: h72/h84/h96/h108 loop5 exact=0.9010/0.3828/0.0000/0.0000; h96 blank_acc=0.7545; final CE=0.3850. Against full h96 baseline 0.8750/0.4740/0.0104/0.0000 and h96 blank_acc=0.7769, compressed schedule improves h72 but loses h84/h96. Lesson: h96 is not unlocked by entering hard stage early; middle curriculum/global-consistency foundation matters. Decision: stop compressed h96 schedules; next useful path is full-length clean hard-stage compute or a real late-state revision mechanism.
